# Whistle AI

> AI-powered export intelligence platform for Korean manufacturers and global B2B buyers.

## What is Whistle AI?

Whistle AI (https://whistle-ai.com) is an AI-powered export management platform that helps Korean manufacturers sell globally and helps international buyers source trending Korean products. Built by MOTIVE Innovation (South Korea), it combines AI product analysis, trade intelligence, and B2B marketplace functionality into a single platform.

## Key Features

### For Korean Manufacturers (Exporters)
- **AI Product Analysis**: Upload a product photo and get instant export intelligence — HS code classification, target market recommendations, competitive analysis, and pricing strategy.
- **HS Code Classification**: AI-powered Harmonized System code identification using Claude AI for accurate customs classification.
- **FTA Simulator**: Free Trade Agreement benefit calculator showing tariff savings across 18+ FTA partner countries.
- **Buyer Matching**: AI-matched connections with verified global B2B buyers actively sourcing Korean products.
- **Export Document Templates**: Auto-generated commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and compliance documents.
- **Market Intelligence**: Real-time market analysis for target export countries including regulatory requirements, certification needs, and demand trends.
- **Certification Guidance**: Step-by-step guidance for FDA, CE, HALAL, ISO, and other international certifications.
- **Alibaba Store Optimization**: AI-powered product listing optimization for Alibaba and other B2B marketplaces.

### For Global Buyers
- **Korean Trend Search**: Real-time trending product data from Korean marketplaces (Naver, Coupang, Olive Young).
- **Verified Manufacturer Directory**: Direct connections to verified Korean factories and OEM/ODM partners.
- **Product Categories**: K-Beauty, K-Food, K-Health, Hair/Body care, and more.
- **Escrow Payment**: Secure payment system protecting both buyer and manufacturer.
- **Sample Requests**: Easy sample ordering with tracked international shipping.

## Technology
- AI Engine: Claude AI (Anthropic) for product analysis, HS code classification, and market intelligence.
- Platform: Web-based SPA, accessible from any device.
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Edge Functions + Realtime).
- Payments: Stripe (global), Toss Payments (Korea).

## Pricing (USD)
- **Free**: Limited AI analysis credits for trial.
- **Starter**: $29/month — 30 AI analyses, basic export tools, email support.
- **Professional**: $79/month — Unlimited AI analyses, FTA simulator, buyer matching, priority support.
- **Enterprise**: $199/month — All features, dedicated account manager, custom integrations, API access.
- **Single Analysis**: $9.90 one-time — Pay per analysis without subscription.
- **Buyer accounts are 100% free.**

## Target Users
- Korean small and medium manufacturers (SMEs) wanting to export.
- Korean beauty (K-Beauty), food (K-Food), and health product companies.
- Global B2B buyers sourcing Korean products.
- Export consultants and trade agencies.
- Companies using Korean government export voucher programs (수출바우처, 제조혁신바우처).

## Company
- **Name**: MOTIVE Innovation Inc. (주식회사 모티브이노베이션)
- **US Entity**: MOTIVE Global, Inc. (Delaware C-Corp)
- **Website**: https://whistle-ai.com
- **Korean Landing**: https://whistle-ai.com/ko
- **English Landing**: https://whistle-ai.com/en
- **Buyer Platform**: https://whistle-ai.com/global-buyer/
- **Industry**: B2B SaaS, International Trade, AI/ML
- **Founded**: 2025, South Korea

## Pages
- `/ko` — Korean manufacturer landing page (한국어)
- `/en` — English global manufacturer landing page
- `/global-buyer/` — Global buyer landing and product search
- `/buyer` — Buyer landing page (multi-language)
- `/app` — Manufacturer dashboard (requires login)
- `/app/buyer` — Buyer dashboard (requires login)
- `/terms` — Terms of service (Korean)
- `/terms/en` — Terms of service (English)
- `/privacy` — Privacy policy (Korean)
- `/privacy/en` — Privacy policy (English, GDPR + CCPA compliant)
- `/refund` — Refund policy (Korean)
- `/refund/en` — Refund policy (English)

## Unique Value Proposition
- Only platform combining AI product analysis + buyer matching + escrow payment for Korean exports.
- Korean government voucher program (수출바우처) eligible — manufacturers can use government funding to pay for Whistle AI.
- Built-in FTA tariff calculator covering 18+ Korea FTA partner countries.
- Integrated escrow payment via Stripe for secure international B2B transactions.
- Dual-language (Korean + English) with localized UX for both manufacturers and buyers.
